narrative:
Greenfield Ex Vill Sd (Highland) exempted village school district has 6,830 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.8 percentage points.
